channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Thursday, February 26
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 09:59 PM (1.635 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 06:13 AM (-0.528 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SW 9 mph
